seoTitle: Lenah Valley vs Leslie Vale — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Lenah Valley and Leslie Vale. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Lenah Valley vs Leslie Vale: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Lenah Valley and Leslie Vale.
heading: Lenah Valley vs Leslie Vale — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Lenah Valley, Tasmania and Leslie Vale, Tasmania. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Lenah Valley has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Leslie Vale (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Lenah Valley or Leslie Vale safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Lenah Valley has a flood risk score of 46/100, while Leslie Vale scores 52/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Lenah Valley scores 49/100 for bushfire risk. Leslie Vale scores 61/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Lenah Valley or Leslie Vale?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Lenah Valley has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.9% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
